---
title: "Intro to R, Quarto, and VSCode"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

> Get comfortable in VS Code, run R code, and render documents with Quarto.

## Slides
[Make slides full screen](slides.qmd)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

{{< include r_midsession_exercise.Qmd >}}

{{< include exercise_1.qmd >}}
